name: Crypto Basis / Funding Rate Arbitrage
description: In crypto perpetual futures markets, a funding rate mechanism keeps futures prices anchored to spot. In bull markets, longs pay shorts periodically (typically every 8 hours). The strategy goes long spot and short perpetual futures simultaneously, earning the funding rate while remaining delta-neutral.
core_logic: Long spot BTC + Short BTC perp. Net P&L = funding_rate_collected - carry_cost. delta = 0. Annualized yield = funding_rate * 3 * 365.

sharpe_ratio.note: bull market; drops below 1.0 in bear

pros: High consistent yield in bull markets
cons: Funding turns negative in bear markets
key_papers: ScienceDirect: funding rate arbitrage in crypto (2025)
signal_buy: Funding rate > 0.03% per period (positive: longs pay shorts → collect funding)
signal_sell: Funding rate < -0.03% per period (negative: shorts pay longs)
